entry.content:
Still failing - 5 consecutive failures now. The sub-agent approach timed out. Let me try a different approach - I'll just manually capture the recent conversation and update memory.
Actually, let me think about this differently. The Session Memory cron is fundamentally broken because it runs in an isolated session. I need to either:
1. Disable it and use a different approach
2. Fix it to run in main session (but the system won't allow that)
3. Have the main session write memory proactively
Let me try option 3 - I'll add logic to the main session to write memory when there's real conversation. I can do this by checking if there have been user messages since the last memory save.
Actually, let me just disable the broken cron and implement a simpler solution.
